scenarios.name: Clean baseline
scenarios.key_policy_outcome: Policy is largely invisible when every path is healthy and uncongested.
scenarios.notable_result: Healthy path selection dominates with minimal explanation burden.

scenarios.name: Latency degradation
scenarios.key_policy_outcome: High-criticality workloads stop using the degraded path before transport fails outright.
scenarios.notable_result: Admissibility shifts before binary reachability changes.

scenarios.name: Jitter storm
scenarios.key_condition: Latency variance rises while paths remain live.
scenarios.key_policy_outcome: Jitter-sensitive workloads are protected without treating the path as fully down.
scenarios.notable_result: PathState and admissibility diverge from binary transport health.

scenarios.name: Drop storm to quarantine
scenarios.key_condition: Persistent bad windows push a path toward quarantine.
scenarios.key_policy_outcome: Escalation is fast, recovery is slower, and hysteresis avoids flapping.
scenarios.notable_result: State transitions expose why a path becomes temporarily inadmissible.

scenarios.name: Gray failure but not hard failure
scenarios.key_condition: A degraded path stays live and transfers succeed.
scenarios.notable_result: Batch stays admissible on DEGRADED_USABLE while strict workloads move healthy.

scenarios.name: Capacity pressure under gray failure
scenarios.key_condition: The healthiest path is near soft capacity while a degraded path keeps headroom.
scenarios.key_policy_outcome: Policy preserves healthy headroom for stricter workloads and spends degraded headroom on tolerant work.
scenarios.notable_result: The healthiest path is not always the selected path.
